title: Evas pilot school
wikitext:
[]: Eva's pilot school             Quote Post by shinji kun » Sat Jan 15, 2011 7:21 am Those eva pilots are concentrating in piloting eva. They run test and practice almost every day. How about they school score? Do they get decent school score? *Is this a nice question?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jan 15, 2011 11:58 am Misato has a line in episode 10 that would indicate the answer to your question is no. I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Jan 15, 2011 12:10 pm The only thing the teacher talks about is Second Impact. I can't imagine the tests being too hard.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Jan 15, 2011 2:13 pm ^ "No, second impact wasn´t caused by your crazy father, Shinji, you´re going to fall history classes if you don´t sit down and learn the truth."

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Jan 15, 2011 2:45 pm Shinji: He lived with his teacher for a while, so I would imagine he knows how to study. He's shown studying in NME, so... Rei: All she does is stare off into space. Either she's some genius who doesn't need to study, or... Asuka: She has a college degree. If she could read kanji properly, I'm pretty sure she would ace every class.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:07 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Asuka: She has a college degree. If she could read kanji properly, I'm pretty sure she would ace every class.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:43 pm Funny you should mention it. I'm rewatching NGE and just finished the Magma Diver episode about 5 minutes ago, and Misato explicitly states that Shinji and Asuka's grades are pretty crappy (Though Asuka's are like that because she hadn't learnt all the Kanji yet).

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Jan 16, 2011 1:52 pm I guess Baka-Shinji is an appropriate nickname, then. "Misato-san, I'm gonna fail my finals!"

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jan 16, 2011 3:30 pm I think more that Shinji's grades were falling because he was missing from shool a lot (The etire training for the israfael fight being the most recent instance, but he also spends a few weeks moping/dispearing off the map after the Schamshel fight) This is the only time we hear Misato complain about their grades, so I guess it really were the Kanji in Asuka's case... Genius or not, she's far too zealous/ambitious to accept being called out for failing the same thing more than once. Actually, Shinji should be pretty intelligent; We see him thinking about a lot of 'deep stuff', and both his parents are geniusses. He just has way more to worry about than school, and I don't think he's the type to raise his arm and ask when he doesn't understand something. As for Rei, when Gendo once asks her about how School is going, she says there are no problems, and she's seen reading complicated books about genetics in her leasure time . She's probably an A student. She might be staring out of the window all the times, but it's Rei we're talking about. That she isn't looking doesn't necessarily mean she isn't listening.

[]:             Quote Post by evafanatic » Sun Jan 16, 2011 4:49 pm Kendrix wrote: Actually, Shinji should be pretty intelligent; We see him thinking about a lot of 'deep stuff', and both his parents are geniusses.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Jan 16, 2011 5:10 pm evafanatic wrote: And I don't think genetics has anything to do with how "intelligent" you are but I think that whole subject is debatable.

[]: Re: Eva's pilot school             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Sun Jan 16, 2011 6:15 pm Shinji kun wrote: How about they school score? Do they get decent school score?

[]:             Quote Post by shinji kun » Mon Jan 17, 2011 3:27 am You know, I'm a person who didn't watch the Neon Genesis Evangelion. Therefore, I don't know the complete story I watched Evangelion 1.0 in TV when I was bored and searching for interesting TV program(I watched only half of it). I ws very curious with eva,then I bought the 2.0 DVD then I downloaded the 1.0 (because I can't find it in shop) and I LOVE evangelion ! Thanks for all reply

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Jan 17, 2011 7:29 am OT: if you liked the first two Rebuilds, then it's always recommended to see the original 26-episode TV series to get a sense of what it was like back in 1995 and understand the differences between the two versions. To be honest, and sticking to the original topic's question IMHO: 1.) Shinji is more of an average student. 2.) Rei doesn't quite attend school as her life is dependent on the Commander's orders, as her attendance there was done at his request, for trying to make her socialize with teenagers of her age (but she's always a loner). 3.) Asuka, despite her college degree, is in school simply to learn about speaking and (perhaps) writing Japanese.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jan 17, 2011 11:39 am I still think Shinji isn't as stupid as many ppl think he is, we got to see the complex insides of his herad often enough, but nah, who gets physics anyway? It just makes your head hurt >.< Don't get me wrong, me saying he might be somewhat smart doesn't necessarily mean that I t think his grades ever got beyond average, because he's always had worse things to wory about than school and as I said before, he's probably too shy to ask when he doesn't get something. And he probably thinks he's as stupid as Asuka tells him he is, so he probably lacks motivation as well/ never got any proper 'input'. And about Rei: I know someone who hardly wrote anything down at shool, was asleep half the time, never did homework or studying for anything except math, and managed to have As and Bs in everything except Math, PE and physics which is % math, so while her Grades might not be entirely flawless (I doubt she cares all too much about them), they could very well be at least somewhat above average. It's not like she'd lie to Gendo about having "no problems". and about Asuka: Asuming that she truly HAS a college degree (She#s arrogant enough to make it up), the likeliest reason for her being in school is for surveilance reasons.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Jan 17, 2011 12:05 pm I read a ReiXNagato doujin once where one of the guys says that he was surprised that an A-plus student like Rei would be such a slut. Must be canon. Rei is a genius.
